goal: Part A landed: site data pipeline now emits `site/data/planning-graph.json` (full envelope) + `site/data/planning-graph-index.json` (token-inverted lookup) on every prebuild via build-site-data.mjs#writePlanningGraphData(). Reader at `site/lib/planning-graph.ts` exposes getPlanningGraph/getPlanningNode/getNeighborhood/searchPlanningGraph with edge-schema normalisation (source/target ↔ from/to), BFS expansion with edgeType + nodeType filters and result cap, and substring-token ranked search. HTTP surface at `GET /api/planning/graph` supports ?related=&radius=&edgeTypes=&nodeTypes=, ?search=&limit=, ?only= for direct node fetch. Smoke-test on the get-anything-done graph: 1019 nodes / 1535 edges; "byok"→5 hits (decisions+phase 48); "197"→decision:gad-197 ✓. Part B (wire into command+K) deferred — vendor site has no global-search UI yet; backend is ready for it.
